offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/week, inefficient reporting causes delays in project updates. We automate daily job completion summaries instead of manual reporting via email or spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient reporting of job completion summaries to project managers.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try template-based summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing job data
